name: Synup Social Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
highlight_text: Who it is best for: Agencies, Resellers, Entpreprise, Small-mid Businesses
product_overview_description:
Synup Social is a smart social tool that combines first-grade scheduling and ideation features with revenue-gen capabilities for agencies and resellers. The tool helps you create a strong presence on social and manage content for multiple locations. You can white label the tool for your clients and use it to drive meaningful outcomes for their brand.

Core Features

🏆Schedule posts across various social media platforms from a single dashboard, streamlining your content distribution.

🏆Comprehensive platform integration (Instagram, LinkedIn, X, Facebook, Pinterest)

🏆Manage social media content for multiple brands, locations, or clients, ensuring consistent messaging across all touchpoints.

🏆Utilize AI technology to generate tailored, engaging posts for your brand and offerings, saving time and effort.

🏆Paid ads support available

🏆Team collaboration with built-in approval workflow

🏆Facebook and Google Business Profile integration

🏆 Managed services for social media posting for teams that don’t have the bandwidth to manage social end-to-end

🏆Complete Whitelabel software for agencies and resellers who want to manage social media for their clients.

What’s great

✅Update Facebook and Google Business Profile listings directly through Synup, maintaining a consistent online presence.

✅Agencies and resellers can manage client social media accounts under their own branding.

✅Tools to enable agencies to drive more business using solutions for sales, prospecting, client management, and payments.

✅Boosts visibility in local search results for multi-location brands

What’s not great

❌Reporting and visualization can be improved

❌Doesn’t have expansive social features such as brand mentions and conversations, which are underway

Pricing

Synup Social costs about $26 per month for the starter plan which is perfect to get a headstart with your social media management. The professional plan, which also offers sponsored posts and ads support, costs $44 per month. Agencies and resellers can contact for a bulk price to optimize their margins.

How to get started with Synup

It’s easy to get your social media posts going within a few minutes through Synup. Sign up for a Synup Social demo and get your account set up. Alternatively, you can self sign up on the platform and upgrade to our paid plan. 

Once your dashboard is setup, you can connect your social media handles with Synup in just a few clicks. On the top you’ll see the option to “Add Brand” to your profile. 

Enter some details to set up your brand account. This includes basics like name, website, timezone, a short bio, logo, and other details. Be careful while picking the timezone of your brand as it will be used to post the content on your social handles.

Once you add a brand account, you can simply start posting. Synup lets you publish directly as well as schedule posts for later.
